---
title: "Today's Top Hits"
format:
  dashboard:
    logo: "images/logo.png"
    orientation: columns
---
## Column {width="35%"}

Placeholder text for column 1

```{r, loadpackages} 
#| echo: false
#| include: false 
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r, print starwars}
head(starwars)
```


## Column {width="65%"}

Placeholder text for column 2

### Row {height="10%"}

Placeholder text for row 1

### Row {height="70%"}

Placeholder text for row 2

### Row {height="20%"}

Placeholder text for row 3
